events.label: response
events.text:
{
  "decision": "fail",
  "risk": "high",
  "work_stage": "rough-complete",
  "component_conditions": ["installed-defective", "non-compliant"],
  "percent_complete": 70,
  "value": 0,
  "sound_source": "",
  "confidence": 0.95,
  "event_time": 0,
  "rate": 0,
  "order": [],
  "workable": [],
  "findings": [
    "Neutral bar bonded to cabinet in subpanel (green bonding screw installed)",
    "Equipment grounding conductors and neutral conductors terminated on same bar",
    "Two branch-circuit conductors under single 20 A breaker terminal",
    "Unused knockout opening in enclosure"
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Remove green bonding screw to isolate neutral bar from cabinet",
    "Install separate equipment grounding bar bonded to cabinet; relocate all bare grounding conductors to it",
    "Remove one conductor from 20 A breaker terminal; install a listed connector or pigtail to a single conductor if breaker is not rated for two",
    "Close unused knockout with a listed closure plug or knockout seal"
  ],
  "rationale": "Subpanel must have isolated neutral (NEC 408.40 exception for existing installations does not apply to new work). Mixing grounds and neutrals on same bar creates objectionable current on grounding paths (NEC 250.6, 250.142). Double-tapping a breaker terminal not listed for two conductors violates NEC 110.14(A). Open knockout compromises enclosure integrity (NEC 110.12(A)). These defects present shock and fire hazards.",
  "references": [
    "NEC 408.40",
    "NEC 250.24(A)(5)",
    "NEC 250.142(B)",
    "NEC 110.14(A)",
    "NEC 110.12(A)"
  ]
}
